creator: matt@thebiz.net
text:
The installation floppies for 4.0-RELEASE (kern.flp, mfsroot.flp) found in /pub/FreeBSD/releases/alpha/4.0-RELEASE/floppies have 4.0-CURRENT in the options.  This naturally makes it a bit harder to install FreeBSD 4.0-RELEASE since the base bin/doc/etc files aren't in that directory.

Fix: 

Workaround is to go into options from sysinstall and change the OS version tag from 4.0-CURRENT to 4.0-RELEASE.  The install works as expected from that point onwards.
